onset_Re.note: Onset Re (cell turns off) is from Route A/B extrapolation, NOT from the linear fit zero-crossing (the fit predicts an asymptote bf->a>0, not bf=0). Route A ~240-260 (Nu/backflow trend). Route B ~100-235 (Ri criterion). Both bracketed from LitRev ch.14.

limitations: 3 data points only: parameter uncertainty is O(1) at 1 DOF
Coarse mesh, laminar, single time per case
Onset Re predictions are extrapolated beyond Re calibration range (68-135)
Ri_median, Ra_median from section-median of solver fields (exact Lc/DeltaT definition not audited against case setup)
All perturbation runs (3275448-3275451) still under T2 qualification gate; not admitted to correlation
Upcomer recirculation cell in UPPER upcomer (TP5/TW8/TP6) is not well captured by this single-station fit; a 2-region model may be needed
